posts.angle: global payment infrastructure is getting better, but workflow friction still sits at the card layer
posts.copy:
Wallet expectations are rising.

Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way. Teams move faster when payment setup does not slow subscriptions, ads, or cross-border checkout.

RichXPay supports use case page for funding a virtual card with usdt or usdc for subscriptions, ads and overseas spending.
sourceTitles: Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way.
We’re adding 3 new ways to make web payments easier and more flexible.
posts.landingSummary: Use case page for funding a virtual card with USDT or USDC for subscriptions, ads and overseas spending.
